focus: Trace the embedding-status state machine end-to-end. Map every code path that writes embedding_status across retry-manager, reindex, and embedder_set/embedder-status handlers.

graphEvents.label: enforceRetryRetentionLimits parks pending/retry rows as failed
index/update path writes initial success or pending
embedder_set reindex writes vectors without metadata status commit
embedder reindex does not write metadata status

label: Retry retention max-age branch parks pending/retry rows as failed before queue processing
Live DB failed rows all carry Retry retention max age exceeded
Retry manager processes clean pending rows by claiming them as retry before success
Initial success writes belong to index/update path, not embedder_set
embedder_set reindex writes target vectors and flips active embedder but does not update memory_index.embedding_status
force scan is not a global embedding_status reset; unchanged dedup can still return unchanged for success/pending/partial
Retry retention only parks rows whose current embedding_status is pending or retry
Embedder reindex completion updates embedder_jobs and active embedder, not memory_index.embedding_status

reason: handler only maps and returns embedder_jobs status; it does not mutate memory_index
